metadata.description: Marketplace privado do Pedro: skills, plugins e automações pessoais — bootstrap, visual, rev6, handoff, improve, ship, project-doc.

plugins.name: bootstrap-third-party
plugins.description: Auto-sync third-party Claude Code marketplaces + plugins across machines via git hooks

plugins.name: visual
plugins.description: CLI walls-of-text → interactive HTML dark-theme views. Plans, diagnostics, and decisions rendered in the browser with live sync back to Claude via local daemon.

plugins.name: rev6
plugins.description: Multi-angle code review via 6 parallel voltagent specialists (architect, backend, frontend, fullstack, code-reviewer, UX). Consolidates findings with P0/P1 highlighting.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Session state preservation — creates a complete knowledge transfer document at {project_root}/.claude/HANDOFF.md for later continuation via /continue.

plugins.name: improve
plugins.description: Generic self-improvement implementer using the autoresearch ML methodology. Reads the app's IMPROVEMENT_PROGRAM.md, fetches proposals from GitHub Issues (label 'autoresearch'), implements changes.

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Production deploy flow: lint, type-check, commit, push, deploy in one disciplined sequence. Triggers on 'ship', 'manda', 'deploya tudo'.

plugins.name: project-doc
plugins.description: Auto-generate a structured CLAUDE.md reference block for a project (stack, ports, env vars, deploy flow, DB, gotchas). Supports standard and monorepo layouts with post-generation verification checks.
